manifest_metadata.coverage_accounting_caveat: The canonical main_touched field may be false when a valid main declaration contains a throws clause; eligibility instead requires direct before/after hashes proving that the exact CodeSteer-selected algorithm method changed.
manifest_metadata.purpose: JDK17-validated long-code obfuscation variants for paired model inference

tokenizer_preflight.selection_rule: Retain only cases whose exact Qwen2.5-14B-tokenized CodeSteer prompt yields a non-positional SlicingPrior vector, an active CASES signal, and fits context.

config.outcome_selection_note: The complete screened pool is retained. Any later all-baselines-fail/CodeSteer-succeeds case-study subset is outcome-selected and must be labeled as such.

score_definition.canonicalization: CRLF/CR to LF, then strip leading/trailing whitespace; internal whitespace preserved
score_definition.name: trimmed_exact_match

static_prior_cache.reason: The unmodified runtime requests the same prompt-static slice once per steered layer and decode token. Recomputing it changes neither the vector nor sampling, but is prohibitively expensive for 250--350-line programs.
static_prior_cache.semantic_effect: none; memoizes a deterministic prompt-static prior vector

selection.trace_quality_heuristic: 15% concise/substantive length, 20% source-identifier grounding, 15% execution vocabulary, 10% target-method grounding, 10% input-literal grounding, 15% intermediate-state evidence, 5% output discussion, and 10% certainty/no code-generation drift; applied only after valid-run, exact, and FINAL_OUTPUT_JSON gates

unique_problem_selection.selection_rule: highest best-trace heuristic score, then lexicographic sample_id
